zh.lifeSummary: 當Maude Hanslape於大約1079年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普時，她的父親Michael Hanslope8歲，母親Mrs Michael de Hanslope4歲。她和William de Mauduit II至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於大約1171年在英國巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maude Hanslape于大约1079年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普时，她的父亲Michael Hanslope8岁，母亲Mrs Michael de Hanslope4岁。她和William de Mauduit II至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于大约1171年在英国巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Maude Hanslape was born about 1079, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Michael Hanslope, was 8 and her mother, Mrs Michael de Hanslope, was 4. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with William de Mauduit II. She died about 1171, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maude Hanslape est née environ 1079, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Michael Hanslope, avait 8 ans et sa mère, Mrs Michael de Hanslope, avait 4 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec William de Mauduit II. Elle est décédée environ 1171, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maude Hanslape um 1079 in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Michael Hanslope 8 und ihre Mutter Mrs Michael de Hanslope 4. Sie hatte mit William de Mauduit II mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1171 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maude Hanslape è nata il circa 1079 nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Michael Hanslope, aveva 8 anni e sua madre, Mrs Michael de Hanslope, aveva 4 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con William de Mauduit II. Morì circa 1171, nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maude Hanslapeが約1079年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペで生まれた時，父Michael Hanslopeは8歳，母Mrs Michael de Hanslopeは4歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Mauduit IIとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1171年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maude Hanslape(이)가 대략 1079년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Michael Hanslope(은)는 8세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Michael de Hanslope(은)는 4세였다. 그녀는 William de Mauduit II(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1171년 영국 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maude Hanslape nasceu aproximadamente 1079, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Michael Hanslope, tinha 8 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Michael de Hanslope, tinha 4 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com William de Mauduit II. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1171, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maude Hanslape родилась около 1079 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Michael Hanslope было 8 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Michael de Hanslope, 4. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от William de Mauduit II. Она умерла около 1171 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 94 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con William de Mauduit II. Murió aproximadamente 1171, en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 94 años.
